latestPrediction.title: NHS Regional Data Platform Modernisation
latestPrediction.recommendationRationale: Recommend Bid with controlled qualification risk. Key positives: Evidence-backed response base, Evidence uplift opportunity, Review-led uplift available. Watch: Bid strength is not yet convincing, Buyer-specific headwind.
latestPrediction.strategistSummary: This pursuit is viable if the current evidence and review gaps are tightened before committing full bid effort.

missingEvidence: Quantified transformation case study for healthcare buyer

factors.title: Evidence-backed response base
factors.explanation: The current pursuit is supported by strong knowledge coverage and review evidence quality.
factors.evidence: Evidence strength 71 with knowledge coverage 84 and review evidence 93.
factors.remediation: Surface the strongest case studies and quantified outcomes in the executive summary and experience sections.

factors.title: Bid strength is not yet convincing
factors.explanation: The current workspace and review signals suggest the bid would not compete strongly without more work.
factors.remediation: Raise completion, evidence depth, and buyer-specific differentiation before committing full bid effort.

factors.title: Evidence uplift opportunity
factors.explanation: A targeted knowledge upload would materially improve qualification confidence and bid credibility.

factors.title: Review-led uplift available
factors.explanation: The Review Engine has already identified practical actions that can improve competitiveness quickly.
factors.evidence: Make the answer more buyer-specific, lead with outcomes, and state differentiators that competitors may struggle to match.
factors.remediation: Make the answer more buyer-specific, lead with outcomes, and state differentiators that competitors may struggle to match.

factors.title: Add stronger comparable delivery proof
factors.explanation: Comparable case studies and quantified experience remain one of the fastest ways to improve evaluator confidence.
factors.evidence: Experience section completion 40 with sector win rate 61%.
factors.remediation: Add the most relevant sector case study and quantify outcomes, mobilisation, and buyer similarity.

factors.title: Buyer-specific headwind
factors.explanation: Historical outcome signals indicate a recurring risk in similar pursuits for this buyer context.
factors.evidence: Strong incumbent advantage seen in similar frameworks.
factors.remediation: Counter this explicitly in the executive summary with proof of differentiators and mobilisation confidence.
